title: codonopsis micrantha
intro: Codonopsis micrantha, also known as the small-flowered codonopsis or small-flowered balmony, is a perennial plant species in the campanulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to tonify the spleen and lung, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Codonopsis micrantha include its potential to boost the immune system, improve respiratory function, and reduce fatigue. Codonopsis micrantha is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is sometimes combined with other herbs like ginseng and licorice root to enhance its medicinal properties.
